title: stelis aggregata
intro: Stelis aggregata, also known as the Clustering Stelis or Yellow Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis aggregata include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Stelis aggregata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
